positive: A highly detailed, stylized wreath composed of bioluminescent celestial elements and intricate botanical flora. The composition must feature a central, symmetrical arrangement. Elements include stylized crescent moons, star trails forming elegant swirls, deep navy blue and cosmic purple nebulas contrasting sharply against emerald green fern fronds, ethereal golden accents, and crystalline dew drops. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern scientific illustration, giving it a luxurious, deep-space tapestry feel. Use clean, defined silhouettes, strong chiaroscuro contrast, and a repeating pattern structure suitable for wrapping around apparel. Full color palette, vector graphic quality.
negative: low detail, noisy, blurry, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, logo, trademark, copyright, blurry edges, extra limbs, malformed anatomy, cartoon, photographic, realistic photo, monochrome, jpeg artifacts
